sentences.arabic: مِنَ الضَّرُورِيِّ حِمَايَةُ مَعْلُومَاتِنَا الشَّخْصِيَّةِ عِنْدَ اسْتِخْدَامِ الْإِنْتِرْنِتِ.
sentences.translation: Neophodno je zaštititi naše lične podatke prilikom korištenja interneta.
sentences.translationEn: It is necessary to protect our personal information when using the internet.

sentences.arabic: يَجِبُ أَنْ نَخْتَارَ كَلِمَاتِ مُرُورٍ قَوِيَّةً لِحِسَابَاتِنَا الْإِلِكْتُرُونِيَّةِ.
sentences.translation: Moramo birati jake lozinke za naše elektronske račune.
sentences.translationEn: We must choose strong passwords for our electronic accounts.

sentences.arabic: يَعْمَلُ خُبَرَاءُ الْأَمْنِ السَّيْبِرَانِيِّ عَلَى مَنْعِ الْهَجَمَاتِ وَالِاخْتِرَاقِ.
sentences.translation: Stručnjaci za kibernetičku sigurnost rade na sprječavanju napada i hakovanja.
sentences.translationEn: Cybersecurity experts work on preventing attacks and hacking.
